description: n8n HTTP endpoint and job lifecycle -- Express/Fastify server wrapping the depthkit library API. POST endpoint accepts topic and duration, returns job ID. Poll endpoint returns job status (queued/rendering/complete/failed). Download endpoint returns MP4. Async job queue for managing concurrent render requests. Status management and cleanup. Per SC-05 (n8n integration works).
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Split from original OBJ-055 (Round 2 Issue 1). HTTP/job lifecycle only -- manifest generation is OBJ-056, asset orchestration is OBJ-057.
